## What & Why

<!-- Briefly describe the change and the motivation behind it. -->

> External-contribution gate: `NOTICE` currently records no legal
> rightsholder/contracting party. External PRs may be discussed, but the CLA
> checkbox below has no activating effect and the PR must not be merged until a
> company or other legal person plus named human legal/rightsholder review is
> recorded. Do not disclose a private identity to bypass this gate.

## Checklist

- [ ] `node harness/scripts/verify.mjs` passes locally
- [ ] All commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) per the DCO
- [ ] **I have read and expressly accept the [Contributor License Agreement](../CONTRIBUTOR_LICENSE_AGREEMENT.md) for every contribution in this pull request, and I confirm that I have the rights needed to make its grants.**
- [ ] Commits are small and atomic, using Conventional Commits messages
- [ ] Documentation updated where relevant
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or machine-specific paths included

The checked CLA item is the audit record of acceptance for this pull request.
It must be checked by the contributor and must not be checked or inferred by a
maintainer, bot, or submission automation on the contributor's behalf.
